project_type: AWS CDK Java project with Python Lambda for sleep audio processing pipeline
test_framework: JUnit 5 with CDK assertions (Template.fromStack, Match, JSON parsing of state machine definitions)
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'mvn test' - all tests must pass. 2. Run 'npx cdk synth' - must produce valid CloudFormation template.
setup_instructions: Java 17 and Maven 3.9.10 are available via mise. Run 'mvn compile' to build.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install Maven packages from central. No Docker daemon needed. The Polly synchronous API returns binary AudioStream that Step Functions cannot serialize - must use StartSpeechSynthesisTask (async API that writes directly to S3) or a Lambda wrapper.
contribution_requirements: 1. TDD-first: write failing tests before implementation. 2. Conventional commit messages (feat:, fix:, etc.). 3. Keep ARCHITECTURE.md Mermaid diagram in sync with code. 4. All infrastructure constructs must have assertion tests.
key_patterns: CDK assertion tests use Template.fromStack() and Match helpers. State machine definition is parsed from Fn::Join intrinsic using ObjectMapper. Tests verify IAM policies, state chain order, catch blocks, retry policies. Lambda uses Python 3.12 with structured JSON logging. Step Functions uses CallAwsService for DynamoDB/Polly and LambdaInvoke for Lambda. Error path: UpdateMetadataStatusFailed -> PublishFailureNotification.
directory_structure: Root: pom.xml, cdk.json, ARCHITECTURE.md, CONTRIBUTING.md. src/main/java/com/myorg/ has CdkBaseApp.java, CdkBaseStack.java, PipelineStack.java. src/main/resources/lambda/audio-processor/index.py is the Lambda. src/test/java/com/myorg/ has 13 test files (89 passing tests).
